text:
You haven't received your 2025 1099 yet. A few things to check:

1099s are only generated and sent when an account crosses the IRS reporting threshold. If you didn't receive one, it may mean your activity last year fell below that threshold — but a human on our ops team will confirm your status and resend if one was issued.

Check your email (including spam) for a message from us with the 1099 attached. If it's not there, reply here with your account email and we'll have ops look into it.

Novig Support
